info.title: Oxygen Pelatologio API
info.description:
Oxygen Pelatologio ERP API enables 3rd party application to connect programmatically to the application and:
* Create or Update data without the need to interact with the interface
* Connect 3rd party applications, such as e-shop or website to automate orders or invoicing

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: vat
parameters.description: Search by contact VAT

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Search by contact code. Accepts multiple contact codes separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Search by email.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve

code.description: Contact code. If empty a random will be created

type.description: The type of the contact. 1 - Private, 2 - Company

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

is_supplier.description: If the contact is a supplier or not. true - is a supplier, false - it is not a supplier

name.description: Name of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

surname.description: Surname of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

company_name.description: The name of the contact. Required only if type is 2

profession.description: The profession of the contact. Required only if type is 2

vat_number.description: The VAT of the contact. If the contact is a non Greek company, the country's 2 letter code should be used as prefix. Required only if type is 2

tax_office.description: The tax officer of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and company is from Greece.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the contact

street.description: The street of the contact. Required only if type is 2

number.description: The number of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and street is present

city.description: The city of the contact. Required only if type is 2

zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact. Required only if type is 2

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: The ID of the contact to be retrieved

put.summary: Update a contact. All values are needed.

code.description: Contact code. If empty a random will be created

type.description: The type of the contact. 1 - Private, 2 - Company

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

name.description: Name of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

surname.description: Surname of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

company_name.description: The name of the contact. Required only if type is 2

profession.description: The profession of the contact. Required only if type is 2

vat_number.description: The VAT of the contact. If the contact is a non Greek company, the country's 2 letter code should be used as prefix. Required only if type is 2

tax_office.description: The tax officer of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and company is from Greece.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the contact

zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact. Required only if type is 2

parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Search from a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Search to a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.description: Search exactly the specific date. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.description: Search by invoice number. Accepts multiple invoice numbers separated by comma (,)

parameters.description: Search by numbering_sequence. Accepts the numbering sequence id.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

number.description: The number of the invoice. If it's empty then the next sequentional number will be used according to the invoices type and sequence.

numbering_sequence_id.description: The numbering sequence id of the invoice

issue_date.description: The issue date of the invoice

enum: p (Invoice for product sales and/or services)
rs (Receipt (issued to private customers) for services)
rp (Receipt (issued to private customers) for products and/or services)

mydata_document_type.description: The document type for MyData as seen at table 8.1 in AADE manual

payment_method_id.description: The id of the payment method to associate with the invoice

description.description: A description about the document. If left blank the description of the first item will be chosen.

contact_id.description: The id of the contact (client) that the invoice will be issued

logo_id.description: The id of the logo to be used. If it's empty the default logo will be used.

code.description: The id or code of the item

warehouse_id.description: The id of the warehouse the quantity will be removed. If skipped the default warehouse will be used.

description.description: The description of the item. Not required if valid product code is provided.

unit_net_value.description: The item unit price without VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

tax_id.description: The ID of the tax to be applied. Not required if valid product code is provided.

net_amount_pre_discount.description: The items' price before discount without VAT.

net_amount.description: The items' price without VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

vat_amount.description: The amount of the VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

mydata_classification_category.description: The mydata category from table 8.8 from AADE manual

mydata_classification_type.description: The mydata type from table 8.9 from AADE manual

is_paid.description: If it is set to true a receipt will be created and the invoice will be marked as paid. It does not work with Self Invoices (type self_inv)

comments.description: Comments to be printed on the invoice

infobox.description: Brief information to be printed on the invoice

bearerAuth.description:
Every endpoint is protected with a bearer token.
During every request the token must be passed with the Authorization header and have the value  Bearer <token>.
In case of error the api returns 401 - Unauthorized.
Also, the "Accept" header should be passed with value "application/json".
